summary: JG12 Iteration 13 - All features tested and working. NutritionPage refactored from 1741 to 950 lines with extracted components (DaySummary, ConfigSection, MealCard, SearchFoodModal). RoutinePage shows 7-day routine with 5 training days and 2 rest days. Dashboard correctly detects Wednesday as rest day and shows rest day targets (P=225, H=170, G=60, 2120 kcal).
passed_tests: ✅ Backend: POST /api/auth/login - Client login works
✅ Backend: GET /api/macros - Returns correct values (Entreno P=190 H=170 G=60, Descanso P=225 H=170 G=60, Peri P=45 H=50, source=auto)
✅ Backend: GET /api/routines/current - Returns 7-day routine with correct structure
✅ Backend: Routine has 5 training days (L, M, J, V, S) and 2 rest days (X, D)
✅ Backend: Routine has cardio on martes (LISS) and sábado (HIIT)
✅ Backend: GET /api/routines/history - Returns routine history
✅ Backend: GET /api/diets/{today} - Returns exists:false when no diet
✅ Backend: POST /api/calculator/distribute (training) - Returns correct meal distribution
✅ Backend: POST /api/calculator/distribute (rest) - Returns P=225, kcal=2120, empty periworkout
✅ Backend: POST /api/calculator/distribute (3 meals) - Works correctly
✅ Frontend: ClientDashboard shows 'HOY · DESCANSO' (Wednesday is rest day)
✅ Frontend: ClientDashboard circular trackers show 0/225 P, 0/170 H, 0/60 G (rest day targets)
✅ Frontend: ClientDashboard shows 0/2120 kcal (rest day calories)
✅ Frontend: ClientDashboard routine card shows 'HOY · Miércoles - Descanso activo'
✅ Frontend: ClientDashboard shows 'ENTRENO: 1980 KCAL · DESCANSO: 2120 KCAL · PERI: 45P/50H'
✅ Frontend: ClientDashboard shows 'AUTO' badge for auto-calculated macros
✅ Frontend: RoutinePage shows 5 DÍAS ENTRENO, 23 EJERCICIOS, 2 DESCANSO stats
✅ Frontend: RoutinePage day grid shows L(4ej), M(5ej), X(rest), J(5ej), V(5ej), S(4ej), D(rest)
✅ Frontend: RoutinePage Wednesday shows 'DÍA DE DESCANSO' card with moon icon
✅ Frontend: RoutinePage clicking on Lunes shows 4 exercises (Press banca, Press inclinado, Aperturas, Fondos)
✅ Frontend: RoutinePage shows trainer notes 'Semana de volumen...'
✅ Frontend: RoutinePage Historial button toggles view correctly
✅ Frontend: RoutinePage History view shows '15 de abril de 2026 - ACTUAL' badge
✅ Frontend: NutritionPage loads with refactored components
✅ Frontend: NutritionPage DaySummary sticky bar shows P/H/G progress (0/235g, 0/220g, 0/60g)
✅ Frontend: NutritionPage ConfigSection shows comidas selector (3/4), momento entreno, peri options
✅ Frontend: NutritionPage MealCards visible: C1, Intra, Post, C2, C3, C4 with correct targets
✅ Frontend: NutritionPage 'SUGIÉREME UN MENÚ', 'Lo hago yo', 'Repetir' buttons visible
✅ Frontend: NutritionPage 'Guardar día' button visible
✅ Frontend: NutritionPage tipo día buttons (entrenamiento/descanso) working
critical_code_review_comments: NutritionPage.jsx: Successfully refactored from 1741 to 950 lines
DaySummary.jsx: Clean extracted component (133 lines) with ProgressBar and sticky summary
ConfigSection.jsx: Clean extracted component (68 lines) with comidas/momento/peri selectors
MealCard.jsx: Clean extracted component (198 lines) with MealProgressBars and food list
SearchFoodModal.jsx: Contains both SearchFoodModal and MenuOptionsModal (173 lines)
ClientDashboard.jsx: Correctly detects rest day from routine and shows rest day targets
RoutinePage.jsx: Well-designed with stats cards, day selector, exercise cards, and history toggle
seed_data_creation: Used existing test accounts with pre-configured macros and routine
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 13 features fully tested. NutritionPage refactored from 1741 to 950 lines with extracted components: DaySummary, ConfigSection, MealCard, SearchFoodModal, MenuOptionsModal. Client has 7-day routine with L(4ex), M(5ex+LISS), X(rest), J(5ex), V(5ex), S(4ex+HIIT), D(rest). Today is Wednesday (miércoles) which is a rest day, so dashboard shows rest day targets (P=225, H=170, G=60, 2120kcal). All data-testids verified and working.
